goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 09:30' and should leave on 'wednesday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'stevenage'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '7 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 09:30 and should leave on wednesday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to stevenage
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 7 people
Make sure you get the reference number
